schema_note: endpoint_type/api_base_url/example_query_url null where not assessed; tier marks verification level; ISO-2 validated against pycountry (invalid -> null).

records.name: African Development Bank — Open Data / Statistics
records.access_notes: Regional bank (Africa). Open Data for Africa platform. Endpoint NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)

records.name: Asian Development Bank — Key Indicators / Data Library
records.access_notes: Regional bank (Asia-Pacific). Data portals kidb.adb.org / data.adb.org. Endpoint NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)

records.name: Bank for International Settlements
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST. API docs: https://stats.bis.org/api-doc/v1/
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: European Central Bank
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST (ECB Data Portal, replaced SDW 2023). Returns SDMX-ML or SDMX-JSON (format=jsondata). No key.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: European Commission — DG Competition
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST; no separate public docs. List flows via dataflow query.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: European Commission — DG Employment, Social Affairs & Inclusion
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST; no separate public docs.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: European Commission — DG Internal Market, Industry, Entrepreneurship & SMEs
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST; no separate public docs.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: Eurostat
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST 2.1 (also 3.0 at .../sdmx/3.0, sdmx1 id ESTAT3). Large queries returned async as ZIP via footer URL. No key.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: Eurostat — Comext and Prodcom databases
records.access_notes: Detailed EU external-trade (Comext) and industrial-production (Prodcom). Agency ID for data is still ESTAT.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: Food and Agriculture Organization — FAOSTAT
records.access_notes: No key. Data: /{lang}/data/{domain}?area=&element=&item=&year=. Mirror base faostatservices.fao.org/api/v1. Bulk ZIP: bulks-faostat.fao.org and fenixservices.fao.org/faostat/static/bulkdownloads. Also bulk-CSV.
records.verification: doc (official FAOSTAT API docs + multiple clients)

records.name: Inter-American Development Bank — Numbers for Development
records.access_notes: Regional bank (Latin America & Caribbean). data.iadb.org. Endpoint NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)

records.name: International Labour Organization (ILOSTAT)
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST. Base moved from www.ilo.org/sdmx/rest to sdmx.ilo.org/rest (~2024). Tools: ilostat.ilo.org/resources/sdmx-tools/
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: International Monetary Fund (IMF Data)
records.access_notes: New IMF Data portal (api.imf.org), launched ~Q1 2025. SDMX-REST 2.1; SDMX 3.0 at /external/sdmx/3.0 (sdmx1 id IMF_DATA3). Legacy: dataservices.imf.org; structures-only registry: sdmxcentral.imf.org. Verify dataflow IDs.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST 1.x: SDMX-ML 2.1 + SDMX-JSON 1.0 (format=jsondata). SDMX 3.0 at /public/rest/v2 (sdmx1 id OECD3). Rate-limited. Data Explorer: data-explorer.oecd.org. Use provider 'ALL' for structures.
records.verification: live+ci-daily

records.name: Pacific Community — Pacific Data Hub .Stat
records.access_notes: Regional producer for Pacific Island states (a key de-US-centring source). SDMX-REST. Docs: docs.pacificdata.org/dotstat. UI: stats.pacificdata.org
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: SDMX Global Registry
records.access_notes: Registry of SDMX structures (not data). Query with agency='all'. Overview: registry.sdmx.org/overview.html
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: UNESCO Institute for Statistics
records.access_notes: AUTH REQUIRED: free registration; key as param or header on every request. Portal: apiportal.uis.unesco.org/getting-started
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: United Nations Children's Fund
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST: SDMX-ML or SDMX-JSON. Main dataflow GLOBAL_DATAFLOW (DSD is DSD_AGGREGATE). Also Countdown-2030 (CONSOLIDATED). Docs: data.unicef.org/sdmx-api-documentation
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development — UNCTADstat
records.access_notes: Bulk CSV + reported API on unctadstat.unctad.org. Endpoint family NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)

records.name: United Nations Development Programme — Human Development Reports
records.access_notes: Documented data-center / API exists (hdr.undp.org). Endpoint family NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)

records.name: United Nations Statistics Division
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST (UNdata). Supports series-keys-only preview/validation.
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: World Bank — World Development Indicators (classic API)
records.access_notes: No API key. XML default; add format=json|jsonstat|xml. Bulk via downloadformat=csv|excel (ZIP). Bespoke JSON shape (header obj + data array). Docs: datahelpdesk.worldbank.org/knowledgebase/articles/889392
records.verification: live+doc (returned data this session)

records.name: World Bank — World Development Indicators (SDMX)
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST face of WDI; also SDMX-JSON via Accept header. NOTE: most users prefer the classic REST-JSON API (see record wb-worldbank-wdi-classic). Docs: datahelpdesk.worldbank.org/knowledgebase/articles/1886701
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: World Bank — World Integrated Trade Solution
records.access_notes: SDMX-REST trade/tariff service. Portal: wits.worldbank.org
records.verification: ci-daily (sdmx1 sources.json, daily CI)

records.name: World Health Organization — Global Health Observatory
records.access_notes: No auth (OData v4 -> JSON). Indicator data e.g. /WHOSIS_000001. *DEPRECATION:* WHO states this endpoint will be retired ~end-2025 in favour of a new OData service tied to data.who.int — VERIFY current endpoint before ingest. Docs: who.int/data/gho/info/gho-odata-api
records.verification: doc (official WHO GHO docs; deprecation flagged)

records.name: World Trade Organization — WTO Stats
records.access_notes: WTO Timeseries API at api.wto.org reportedly requires a free key. NOT verified this run.
records.verification: background (org/portal known; endpoint not assessed)
